.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper version constant from 0.5.4 to 0.5.6.
Remove a trailing space in the default download URL string concatenation to ensure the correct artifact path.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the namespace change of the utility class in the newer JHipster version.
Update the Spring Boot application source class reference to match the renamed main application class.
Replace Javadoc-style comment with a standard single-line comment for brevity.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: // set a default to use when no profile is configured.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for JHipsterConstants to reflect the new package structure in the updated JHipster version.
Replace class-level logger with a method that retrieves the logger for the specific target class of the join point to improve log accuracy.
Simplify log messages by removing the redundant declaring type name since the logger is now scoped to the target class.
Reformat pointcut annotations and method calls to adhere to updated code style guidelines.
Update the Javadoc example link to point to the new package location of JHipsterProperties in the newer generator version.
Refine the class description to be more specific to the Vue sample application.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'Properties specific to Jhipster.' to 'Properties specific to Jhipster Sample Application Vue.'

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unnecessary whitespace and empty lines from the class body.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Collapsed the class body to a single line: public class ApplicationProperties {}

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the async task executor class from the legacy io.github.jhipster package to the new tech.jhipster package structure.
Update JHipster configuration package imports from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster to align with library versioning changes.
Refactor cache creation logic to clear existing caches instead of destroying them, and ensure creation happens if the cache does not exist.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: if (cache != null) { cache.clear(); } else { cm.createCache(cacheName, jcacheConfiguration); }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add support for Git and Build properties to enable prefixed cache key generation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private GitProperties gitProperties; private BuildProperties buildProperties;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Inject optional Git and Build properties using setter injection with @Autowired(required = false).
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: @Autowired(required = false) public void setGitProperties(GitProperties gitProperties) { this.gitProperties = gitProperties; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Register a PrefixedKeyGenerator bean to generate cache keys based on git and build information.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: @Bean public KeyGenerator keyGenerator() { return new PrefixedKeyGenerator(this.gitProperties, this.buildProperties); }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the simple login validation regex with a more complex pattern that supports email formats and a wider range of special characters.
Rename the constant SYSTEM_ACCOUNT to SYSTEM for brevity or alignment with framework conventions.
Remove the unused or deprecated ANONYMOUS_USER constant from the configuration class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: removed public static final String ANONYMOUS_USER = "anonymoususer";

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Adjust the formatting of the private constructor to use empty braces on the same line.
Update import statements to reflect the migration of JHipster libraries from the io.github.jhipster namespace to the tech.jhipster namespace.
Remove the Jackson Afterburner module dependency and bean definition, likely due to compatibility issues or deprecation in newer Jackson versions targeting Java 11.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of AfterburnerModule and deleted the afterburnerModule() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add explicit public access modifier to Spring bean methods for consistency or stricter compiler settings.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'ProblemModule problemModule()' to 'public ProblemModule problemModule()' and similarly for constraintViolationProblemModule.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update JHipster imports from the old io.github.jhipster namespace to the new tech.jhipster namespace.
Remove the custom AsyncSpringLiquibase class in favor of the utility method provided by the updated JHipster library.
Remove the CacheManager dependency from the LiquibaseConfiguration constructor as it is no longer used.
Update the SpringLiquibase bean definition to use ObjectProvider for DataSource injection, aligning with Spring Boot 2.x/3.x best practices.
Configure additional Liquibase properties such as schema, tablespace, and rollback settings supported by the newer library version.
Migrate the AngularCookieLocaleResolver import from the legacy io.github.jhipster namespace to the new tech.jhipster namespace.
Remove the explicit name attribute from the @Bean annotation since the method name already provides the bean name.
Update import statement to reflect the package name change from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster for JHipster constants.
